name: Outreach
description: Monitor Outreach sales engagement platform for team access and communication data compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to https://developers.outreach.io and create a new OAuth app
2. Set the redirect URI to the one provided by CompAI
3. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
4. Enter them in CompAI to connect your Outreach account

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Outreach users with access to the sales engagement platform

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Outreach sales engagement platform is operational
